title: Toolbar Icon Visual Containment Polish
summary: Widens compact toolbar action buttons so SVG icons sit visually inside the solid toolbar canvas instead of spilling toward the gradient edge.

items: Increased compact toolbar button horizontal padding from 4px to 6px so icons read as contained within the toolbar canvas
Increased compact button minimum width from 28px to 32px to match the wider inset in both search and wave panel toolbars
